patches.changes:
+ recursive check for nearest unequal characters
+ added null and boundary(length) checks
patches.diff:
+ recursive check for nearest unequal characters
+ added null and boundary(length) checks
patches.original_hypothesis: The error is caused by the CharSequenceUtils.regionMatches method, specifically the way it handles the length of the CharSequences. The method compares the characters at each index in the sequences, but it does not check for the length of the sequences beforehand. This causes an index out of range error when the sequences are different lengths.
